name: Gaming Legends Skin Pack
author: rezikahany-commits
description: 80 Videogame Characters Including Protagonists, Antagonists, Side Characters, And Even Fanmade Characters. New Characters Will Be Added In Future Updates
extended_description:
If you love gaming then you are going to love this one, this skin pack includes 80 gaming characters, i will try to make this skin pack the biggest one in Minecraft Legacy Edition.

here is the link for the discord server, so you guys can give me skin suggestions and ideas.
